task_completion.description: The complete R script for the analysis is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or RStudio window showing a script named 'airway_de_analysis.R' in '/home/ga/RProjects/' containing code for DESeq2, edgeR, or limma.

task_completion.description: The differential expression analysis is executed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal or R console showing the execution of the R script or commands, with output logs indicating successful running of DESeq, edgeR, or limma functions.

task_completion.description: The full differential expression results table is saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer showing 'de_results.csv' in '/home/ga/RProjects/output/', or the file opened showing columns like gene_id, log2FoldChange, pvalue, padj, and significant status.

task_completion.description: A volcano plot is generated and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image viewer or RStudio plot pane displaying 'volcano_plot.png', showing a scatter plot with log2FoldChange on the x-axis and -log10(p-value) on the y-axis.

task_completion.description: A heatmap of the top 30 significant genes is generated and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image viewer or RStudio plot pane displaying 'top_genes_heatmap.png', showing a grid-like color map representing gene expression levels across samples.

task_completion.description: A summary of the analysis is saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer showing 'de_summary.csv' in '/home/ga/RProjects/output/', or the file opened showing numerical counts for total genes, significant genes, upregulated genes, and downregulated genes.

integrity.description: The agent actually ran the R code rather than manually creating mock output files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of R console output, RStudio environment variables, or terminal logs showing the actual processing of the RNA-seq data.

integrity.description: The generated plots appear to be genuine R outputs.
integrity.visual_evidence: The volcano plot and heatmap use standard R plotting aesthetics (e.g., ggplot2, pheatmap, or base R graphics) and contain data points consistent with RNA-seq analysis, rather than looking like generic stock images.

integrity.description: The agent used the provided airway dataset.
integrity.visual_evidence: The R script or console history explicitly shows loading '/home/ga/RProjects/datasets/airway_counts.csv' and '/home/ga/RProjects/datasets/airway_coldata.csv'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses real human airway smooth muscle RNA-Seq data. The output directory is /home/ga/RProjects/output. Expected files are de_results.csv, volcano_plot.png, top_genes_heatmap.png, and de_summary.csv. A valid analysis should yield at least 50 significant genes. Known upregulated genes by dexamethasone in this dataset include ENSG00000103196 (CRISPLD2), ENSG00000120129 (DUSP1), and ENSG00000163884 (KLF15); if visible in the outputs, these should appear as significant and upregulated.
